{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir wiſſi dſertama Tran- 
ki ta Kehnixa Salamana bija
no Selta/ un wiſſi Tranki ta
Namma no Ahbanus Mescha
bija no tihra Selta. Sudraba
tur ne bija klaht/ jo tas Sala-
mana Laika ne tappe zeenihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tam Kehninam bij
9. Latiwas Juhra/ kas us Tarsu
gahje ar Jrama Latiwabin/fchahs
Latiwas no Tarsus nahze treijds
Gaddos weenkahrt atpakat/un
atneffe Seltn un Sudrabu/ E-
lewantu-Kanlus/ un Pehrtikes/
un Pawas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä kluä tas Kehninsch
Salamans teelaks/ ne ka wiſſi
Kehnizi wirs Semmes/ Bag-
gatiba un Gudriba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſa Bafaute mekle-
ja Salamanu redseht/ka tee wix-
na Gudribu dsirdetu/ ko Deews
winnam bij Sirdi dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un iſkatrs no teem neffe
Dahwanas/ Sudraba un Selta
Trankus/ un Drehbes/ un Kruh-
schu- Brunnas / un dahrgas
Sahles/ un Sirgus/ un Sirg-
Ebsetus igaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Salamans fapulzi-
naja Rattus un Jahtneekus/ un
Gr: winnam bij tuhſtoſchi un tſchetr-
fints Ratti/ un divipadefmits
tuhſtoſchi Jahtneeki/ un wiſſch
likke tohs Rattu-Pilsfahtös/un
pee ta Kehnixa Jerusaleme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch padar-
rija/ ka Jerusaleme tik dauds
Sdraba bija/ ka Akmini/ un
ie dauds Zcedra-Rehku bija/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamanam tappe
Egiptes Sirgi atwesti/ un w
fada Prezze/ un ta Kehni-
Prezzineeki pirzin pirke tahs p
ichas Prezzes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ratti tappe no Egi-
tes augſcham atwesti/ par feſc
ſints Sudraba Gabbaleem/ u
weens Sirgs par ſints un pe-
definiteein. Un ta tappe zaur
Prezzineeku Rohku wiſſeem Ke-
nizeein to Getiteeu/ un teem Si-
rijas Kehnineein tahdi atwesti
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XI. Nodalla.
Salamans tohp zaur elfadeewigahm Seewa
peewilts: 1/3. Kalpo jwescheem Deegee
5. Tapehz Deews winnu pikichi aprahi
Un beedina winnu breeſmigi ar to Melai-
kas pahr winna Pehznahkameem un wie-
Laudim nahks: 11. Pazeff prett Salama-
to Adadu: 14. Ka arri Resonu: 23.
Praweets Afijus dohd Jerobeamam defu-
Ziltis: 29. Salamans nomirst: 43.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas Kehninsch Sa-
lmans eemihleja dau-
ſwechasSeewas/ pal-
pahr Waraitis Meitu/ Moabit-
kas/ Ammonitistas/ Eedomit-
kas/ Zihdonitistas/ Getitiskas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No teem Paganceem/
ka tas KUNGS us Israe-
Behrneem bij fazzijs: Jums
buhs pee teem ee-eet / un lai-
pee jums arri ue ee-eet / tee-
teeti jnhfu Sirdis lohzihs-
wein Deeweem pakat. Schah-
veekehrahb Salamans ar M-
lestibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,

      "text": "Un winnam bij feptinfim-
"
